prompt: I need to add a new authentication system to this project. Help me figure out the right approach using the Prism workflow.
expected_output: Prism meta-skill activates and routes to the correct starting phase based on existing .prism/ artifacts
expectations: prism-locator agent is spawned to check for existing research/plans in .prism/
Workflow selection logic is applied (R->P->I->V for unfamiliar work, or abbreviated if artifacts exist)
The correct phase skill is recommended or invoked based on findings
If .prism/ directory does not exist, init_prism.py is suggested
